---
title: "dactylis"
author: "JL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(patchwork)
theme_set(theme_classic(base_size = 18)) #for ggplot

```

```{r}
dac <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "Dactylis_Demography_Data_CLEANED_2016thru2025.csv"))
climate <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "CGOP_climatevalues_scaled.csv"))
climate<- climate %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(across(-year, ~lag(.x), .names = "prev_{.col}"))

dac <- left_join(dac, climate, by = c("Year" = "year"))
dac <- dac %>% 
  mutate(Year = as.factor(Year), 
         Plot = as.factor(Plot),
         survT = as.factor(survT),
         survT1 = as.factor(survT1),
         pflowerT = as.factor(pflowerT),
         pflowerT1 = as.factor(pflowerT1),
         log.no.stems = log(No.stems),
         log.no.stemsT1 = log(No.stemsT1),
        trt = as.factor(trt),
        trt = fct_relevel(trt, "irrigated", "control", "drought"))

dac <- dac %>% 
  filter(!(Plot %in% c("4", "5", "15")))
```


```{r}
base <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*as.numeric(Year) + (1|Plot), data = dac, REML = F)
base2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems+as.numeric(Year) + (1|Plot), data = dac, REML = F)
a1 <- anova(base, base2, test="LRT") #LRT test - removing 2 way interaction does not significantly change model
base3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems+ (1|Plot), data = dac, REML = F)
a2 <- anova(base3, base2, test="LRT") #yes year is significant
best.growth <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Year) + (1|Plot), data = dac, REML = F)

re_year <- rownames_to_column(
  as.data.frame(ranef(best.growth)$Year),
  var = "year") %>% 
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year))
  # $Year
#      (Intercept)
# 2016  -0.3548889
# 2017  -0.2427253
# 2018  -0.1011835
# 2019   0.1779538
# 2020   0.2225865
# 2021  -0.2463669
# 2022   0.2246864
# 2023  -0.2343154
# 2024   0.5542534
# 
grow.corr <- left_join(re_year, climate) %>% 
  select(-year)
names(grow.corr)[names(grow.corr) == "(Intercept)"] <- "int"
cor_matrix <- cor(grow.corr)
correlations <- cor_matrix[,"int"]

# Optional: remove int itself
correlations <- correlations[names(correlations) != "int"]

# Step 5: Sort by absolute strength
correlations_sorted <- sort(correlations, decreasing = TRUE)
###
vars <- names(grow.corr)[names(grow.corr) != "int"]

# Compute correlations and p-values
cor_results <- lapply(vars, function(v) {
  test <- cor.test(grow.corr$int, grow.corr[[v]])
  data.frame(
    variable = v,
    correlation = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

# Combine into one data frame
cor_results <- do.call(rbind, cor_results)

# Sort by absolute correlation
cor_results <- cor_results[order(-abs(cor_results$correlation)), ]

cor_results

g1 <- 

```


```{r ground truthing lambda}
lam <- dac %>%
 # filter(Xcoor < 10) %>%
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(as.character(Year))) %>%  # fix ordering
  group_by(Year, Plot) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(survT == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Plot, Year) %>%
  group_by(Plot) %>%
  mutate(
    lambda = lead(n) / n
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
(lambda <- ggplot(lam, aes(x = as.character(Year), y = lambda, color = Plot)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Plot), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1)+
  labs(x = "Year", y = expression(lambda)) +
  theme_minimal())
(n <- ggplot(lam, aes(x = as.character(Year), y = n, color = Plot)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Plot), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Number of plants") +
  theme_minimal())
(to <- lambda/n +plot_layout(guides = "collect")
)
ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "groundtruth.lambda.png"), plot = to, width = 8, height =6)

```


```{r Sample Plots}
#sample plots
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
#plots 5, 4, 15 may need to be excluded - not many individuals for the random effects

#survival
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#flowering
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(pflowerT)-1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(pflowerT), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = as.numeric(pflowerT), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#no.panicles
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)
```
```{r}
#whats a better size measurement - log(no.stems *height) or log(no.stems)?
size.test1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
size.test2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log(No.stems*Height) + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
AIC(size.test1, size.test2)
#first one

```
```{r growth model selection}
gm.base.size <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

##grow season total precip
gm.gs.precip <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#grow season ave temp
gm.gs.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer av temp
gm.summer.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer precip
gm.summer.p <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
#.prev.summer precip
gm.summer.p.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

################################################################################
###
growth <- mget(ls(pattern = "^gm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
growth_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = growth, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- growth_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "growth"

summary(gm.summer.p)
```

```{r growth model selection}
gm.base.size <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#grow season ave temp
gm.gs.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer av temp
gm.summer.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp + summer.tot.precip+  (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip +spring.mean.min.temp+  (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

gm.summer.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp + trt + summer.tot.precip+(1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp + trt + summer.tot.precip+(1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.min.temp*trt +summer.tot.precip+ (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.min.temp*trt + summer.tot.precip+(1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer precip
gm.summer.p <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
#.prev.summer precip
gm.summer.p.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3.prev <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

################################################################################
###
growth <- mget(ls(pattern = "^gm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
growth_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = growth, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- growth_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "growth"

summary(gm.summer.p)
```

```{r growth figure}
pred.dat.g <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.tot.precip = c(-1.271, 1.443))
pred.dat.output.g <- cbind(pred.dat.g, as.data.frame(predict(gm.summer.p, newdata = pred.dat.g, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.g)[ncol(pred.dat.output.g)] <- "log.no.stemsT1"  # Renaming the last column

# (growth <- dac %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(growth <- dac %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1))+
  geom_point(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, shape = 1)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.g, aes(color = factor(summer.tot.precip)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .4)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer total precipitation in t", values = c("darkorange","deepskyblue"), labels = c("Dry", "Wet")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "growth.png"), plot = growth, width = 6, height =6)


```

```{r pflower model selection}
fm.base.size <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.base.trt <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.base.trt.int <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

##grow season total precip
fm.gs.precip <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.int <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#grow season ave temp
fm.gs.av.temp <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#summer av temp
fm.summer.av.temp <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#prev.summer av temp
fm.summer.av.temp.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.int.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3.prev <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#summer precip
fm.summer.p <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.int <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

################################################################################
###
pflower <- mget(ls(pattern = "^fm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
pflower_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = pflower, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- pflower_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "pflower"

summary(fm.summer.av.temp
)
summary(fm.base.size
)
```

```{r pflower figure}
# pred.dat.p <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.mean.temp = c(-1.836, 1.825))
# pred.dat.output.p <- cbind(pred.dat.p, as.data.frame(predict(fm.summer.av.temp, newdata = pred.dat.p, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
# colnames(pred.dat.output.p)[ncol(pred.dat.output.p)] <- "pflowerT"  # Renaming the last column

pred.dat.p <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1))
pred.dat.output.p <- cbind(pred.dat.p, as.data.frame(predict(fm.base.size, newdata = pred.dat.p, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.p)[ncol(pred.dat.output.p)] <- "pflowerT"  # Renaming the last column

# (flowering <- dac %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(flower <- dac %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(pflowerT)-1))+
  geom_jitter(data = dac ,alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.p, aes(y = pflowerT),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
 # scale_color_manual(name = "Summer average temp", values = c("cyan4","maroon"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Probability of Flowering in t"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "flower.png"), plot = flower, width = 6, height =6)

```

```{r survival model selection}
sm.base.size <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.base.trt <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.base.trt.int <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

##grow season total precip
sm.gs.precip <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.int <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#grow season ave temp
sm.gs.av.temp <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#summer av temp
sm.summer.av.temp <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
#prev_summer av temp
sm.summer.av.tempprev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.intprev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trtprev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1prev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2prev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3prev_ <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

#summer precip
sm.summer.p <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.int <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(survT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, family = "binomial")

################################################################################
###
surv <- mget(ls(pattern = "^sm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
surv_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = surv, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- surv_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "survival"

summary(sm.summer.av.temp.int
)
```

```{r pflower figure}
pred.dat.s <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.mean.max.temp = c(-2.048, 1.286))
pred.dat.output.s <- cbind(pred.dat.s, as.data.frame(predict(sm.summer.av.temp.int, newdata = pred.dat.s, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.s)[ncol(pred.dat.output.s)] <- "survT1"  # Renaming the last column

# (flowering <- dac %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(survival <- dac %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(survT1)-1))+
  geom_jitter(data = dac ,alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.s, aes(y = survT1, color = factor(summer.mean.max.temp)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer max temp in t", values = c("cyan4","maroon"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Probability of Survival in t + 1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "survival.png"), plot = survival, width = 6, height =6)

```

```{r panicles model selection}
poisson.base.size <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.base.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.base.trt.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

##grow season total precip
poisson.gs.precip <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#grow season ave temp
poisson.gs.av.temp <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#summer av temp prev_
poisson.summer.av.tempprev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.intprev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trtprev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int1prev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int2prev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int3prev_ <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*prev_summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#summer av temp
poisson.summer.av.temp <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#summer precip
poisson.summer.p <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(dac, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

################################################################################
###
panicles <- mget(ls(pattern = "^poisson")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
panicles_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = panicles, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- panicles_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "no.panicles"

summary(poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int2)
```

```{r number panicles figure}
pred.dat.pan <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), spring.mean.temp = c(-1.836, 1.825), trt = c("drought", "control", "irrigated"))
pred.dat.output.pan <- cbind(pred.dat.pan, as.data.frame(predict(poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int2, newdata = pred.dat.pan, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.pan)[ncol(pred.dat.output.pan)] <- "No.panicles"  # Renaming the last column

# (flowering <- dac %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(pan <- dac %>% 
    filter(No.panicles>0) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = No.panicles))+
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.pan, aes(y = No.panicles, color = factor(spring.mean.temp)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Spring average temp in t", values = c("#00a3a3","#d72a96"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
    facet_wrap(~trt)+
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Number of panicles in t"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "pan.png"), plot = pan, width = 12, height =6)

```
